Name: Damage Assessment Form
Purpose:
• Used as CERT volunteers travel through the area to their staging location
• Provides a summary of overall hazards in selected areas
• Includes information on fires, utility hazards, structural damage, injuries/deaths, and access
• Essential for prioritizing and formulating action plans

Name: Emergency Doc
Purpose:
• Used for sending messages between command levels and groups
• Messages should be clear, concise, and focus on key issues like assignment completion, additional resources required, special information, and status updates

Name: Communications Log
Purpose:
• Completed by the radio operator
• Used to log incoming and outgoing transmissions

Name: Assignment Tracking Log
Purpose:
• Used by the Command Post to track situation status
• Contains essential information for monitoring the overall situation

Name: Treatment Area Log
Purpose:
• Completed by medical treatment area personnel
• Records survivors entering the treatment area, their condition, and status

Name: Victim Data Form
Purpose: - Ideal form to gather all information on victims that require prolonged attention

Name: Briefing Assignment Form
Purpose:
• Used by the Command Post to provide instructions to functional teams
• Used by teams to log their actions and report new damage assessment information

Name: Equipment Inventory
Purpose: - Used to check out and check in CERT-managed equipment

Name: Personnel Resources Check-In Form
Purpose:
• Used to sign in CERT volunteers as they arrive at the staging location
• Tracks who is on site, when they arrived, when assigned, and special skills
• Used by staging personnel to track personnel availability
